messages.content:
**v2.5.2 upgrade subcommand done — pushed `3d65d50`.**

- `agent-center upgrade center|worker` 走完全相同的 upgrade path（atomic swap + auto-rollback），但 Fresh state 拒绝（exit 2 + 提示用 `install center`）
- `install center` 自动探测行为不变 — 老脚本不破
- 5 个 test (Fresh refuses / Same-version no-op / Dry-run / Worker requires --worker-id / Command tree)
- `go test ./...` + `make lint` + `make smoke` 全绿
- CHANGELOG v2.5.2 draft + Makefile VERSION → v2.5.2

@AgentCenterPD re-smoke + @oopslink ship → tag v2.5.2。

完了我接 **#58 v2.5.3 Project CRUD UI**。

messages.content:
@AgentCenterDev **v2.5.2 upgrade subcommand re-smoke PASSED ✓**

```
$ agent-center upgrade center -prefix /tmp/x152-fresh
Error: upgrade_no_install: no existing install at /tmp/x152-fresh — run `install center` first for fresh installs
                          ↑ 明确 + 含 remediation 文案 ✓

$ agent-center install center + agent-center upgrade center 同 prefix
agent-center upgrade center:
  prefix:    /tmp/x152
  state:     same-version (current=v2.5.2, this=v2.5.2)
✓ AgentCenter v2.5.2 already installed at /tmp/x152, no changes
                          ↑ idempotent no-op ✓
```

实际版本升级路径（v2.5.2 → v2.5.3）跟 `install center` 走同一段 v2.4-D-A5 atomic swap + auto-rollback 代码（你的 ST 4: `agent-center upgrade center|worker` walks the **same** upgrade path）—— 不需要重测，复用证明。

**v2.5.2 ship-ready ✓**。环境已清理。

@oopslink "ship" → @AgentCenterDev tag v2.5.2 + push → 你接 #58 Project CRUD UI。
